description_long: This is a rectangular, upright carton with a predominantly white and gold color scheme, featuring the brand name 'FARAGELLO GOLD' prominently on the front. The packaging displays a large, realistic illustration of a yellow guava fruit, indicating the product's flavor or main ingredient. The top of the carton is fitted with a white, screw-on cap for dispensing the contents, and the cap is positioned off-center. The sides of the carton are printed with the word 'FARAGELLO' in large vertical gold letters, along with additional product information and branding. The back of the carton contains detailed nutritional facts, ingredients, and multilingual text, as well as a barcode and QR code. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, with smooth surfaces and minimalistic graphics, making it visually appealing and easy to identify.
description: A white and gold rectangular carton with a screw-on cap, featuring a guava illustration and detailed branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the 'FARAGELLO GOLD' branding and a large guava illustration, with the cap visible at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the vertical 'FARAGELLO' text and the angled cap, with minimal graphics.
description_view_2: Back view displays nutritional information, ingredients, and various product details in multiple languages.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the vertical 'FARAGELLO' text and the cap, with less visible branding than the front.
